description: The World at War 18 -- Occupation, Holland 1940-1944 Summary Describes how the Gestapo, the German secret police commanded by Himmler, carried out Germany's crimes and atrocities during its occupation of Holland from 1940 to 1944, creating a nightmare for its citizens. Jews were victims of genocide and 105,.00 of Holland's 140,000 Jews were killed during the Nazi occupation.

Holland 1940-1944

title: The World at War 18 -- Occupation, Holland 1940-1944
